TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Battle, title = John_Battle, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Battle} }

S.FORM: John Battle sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, John Battle, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

John Battle sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 11, John Battle, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħn βattle s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *oħn βattle, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
